positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a vibrant, glowing hot air balloon soaring above a picturesque landscape at sunrise. The scene features dramatic silhouettes of rolling hills and scattered trees silhouetted against a breathtaking gradient sky. The hot air balloon is the central subject, drawn with clean, bold lines, and filled with warm, radiant oranges, deep magentas, and soft yellows. The overall style is a sophisticated blend of mid-century modern illustration and ethereal watercolor washes, emphasizing strong contrast between the dark foreground silhouettes and the luminous sky. Ideal for apparel print, with clean edges and scalable design elements. High detail, crisp linework, maximal luminosity.
